creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue, 6 Mar 2012, edwin@FreeBSD.org wrote:

Thanks for the report.

Yeah, ideally the code would just DTRT dependent on openssl version.
I'll look into that.  Would adding

WITH_OPENSSL_BASE=

to the makefile work for you in the meantime?  It's not that it'll
usually do a lot of SSL traffic so performance differences between
port and base system should be negligible.

-- 
Bjoern A. Zeeb                                 You have to have visions!
          Stop bit received. Insert coin for new address family.
